description: 表示习惯/事实/常态。动词用原形(第三人称加s)。
examples_json: [{"en":"I eat breakfast every day.","zh":"我每天吃早餐。"}]

description: 表示现在正在进行的动作。be + doing。
examples_json: [{"en":"I am eating lunch right now.","zh":"我正在吃午饭。"}]

description: 表示过去完成的动作。动词用过去式。
examples_json: [{"en":"I visited Paris last year.","zh":"我去年去了巴黎。"}]

description: 表示过去某时正在进行的动作。was/were + doing。
examples_json: [{"en":"I was watching TV when she called.","zh":"她打电话时我正在看电视。"}]

description: 表示过去发生但与现在相关的动作。have/has + 过去分词。
examples_json: [{"en":"I have finished my homework.","zh":"我已经完成了作业。"}]

description: 动词的过去分词形式。用于完成时和被动语态。
examples_json: [{"en":"Eaten is the past participle of eat.

description: 用于即时决定、预测、承诺。I'll help you。
examples_json: [{"en":"I will call you tomorrow.","zh":"我明天会打电话给你。"}]

description: 用于已有计划或迹象预示的事情。
examples_json: [{"en":"I am going to visit my grandparents this weekend.","zh":"我这周末打算去看望祖父母。"}]
